pages.title: The Survival Guide
pages.text: You're holding proof that knowledge is power. This guide covers everything you need to know about keeping animals alive and productive — feeding, watering, taming, breeding, and more.

pages.title: This Book
pages.text: Craft the guide with a Book and some Wheat Seeds. Keep it in your hotbar.

pages.title: Jade
pages.text: Install $(l)Jade$() to see real-time animal stats — hunger, thirst, tameness, coat, breeding status, and more — just by looking at an animal. Highly recommended.
